shell.gigw: Designed for GIGW accessibility guidelines and WCAG 2.1 AA.
shell.authBullet1: HTTP-only session cookie — no tokens in the browser
shell.authBullet2: Row-level security enforced on every database query

dashboard.govSubtitle: Your workspace — modules and metrics scoped to your role and organisation.
dashboard.rlsNote: Data is filtered by your org subtree. RLS is enforced server-side.
dashboard.budgetDesc: District allocation for FY 2024-25 testing and quality assurance programmes.

districtMap.title: Map
districtMap.selectTaluk: Click a taluk on the map or list to view details

notif.vendorApproved: Vendor registration approved — TN Labs Pvt Ltd
notif.qualityAlert: Quality alert flagged on Milestone M-042

insights.vendorApprovals: Vendor approvals increased by 24% this month
insights.complianceTrend: Compliance rate trending upward across 16 districts
insights.budgetForecast: Budget utilization on track — projected 78% by Q2

activity.vendorApproved: Vendor KYC approved — TN Labs Pvt Ltd
activity.reportUploaded: Quality report uploaded for Milestone M-038
activity.awardIssued: L1 award issued — Bridge Deck Testing

dashboard.qualityDesc: Milestone health from results, escalations, and certificate status.
dashboard.analyticsDesc: Procurement KPIs — orders, bids, treasury payments.

engineer.plannerDesc: Generate the testing calendar from IS-code rules.
engineer.ordersDesc: Float sealed tenders and award L1.

officer.vendorsDesc: Approve lab registrations in your district.

vendor.subtitle: Bid on tenders, execute field jobs, and track held payments.
vendor.ordersDesc: Eligible floated RFQs in your service area.
vendor.jobsDesc: Awarded site work — check-in, QR bind, results.
vendor.alertsDesc: Tender updates, reveal windows, and awards.
vendor.accreditationBody: Expired NABL or PWD scope hides live tenders — notifications remain as dead links.

dev.signInHelp: Development sign-in. In production this is phone + OTP; the session lives in an HTTP-only cookie, never in the browser.
dev.secureNote: Secured by row-level security · MeitY-ready architecture

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitleHead: Manage users, roles, vendor onboarding, tab visibility, and system settings statewide.
admin.subtitleDistrict: Add officers, manage role grants, and control tab visibility within your district scope.
admin.noAccessBody: You need user.manage or vendor.approve permission within your organisation scope.
admin.vendorsDesc: Review and approve lab KYC submissions in your district scope.
admin.rolesReadOnly: Role definitions are read-only at district level. Contact a head admin to add or edit roles.
admin.navGlobalHelp: Choose which sidebar tabs each role sees globally. Hidden tabs remain permission-gated on direct URL access.
admin.navDistrictHelp: You may hide additional tabs for roles in your district. Tabs hidden globally cannot be revealed here.
admin.noActivities: No recorded activity for this user yet.

pricing.title: My rates
pricing.subtitle: Publish what your lab charges per test. Unpriced tests cannot be bid on.
pricing.stopConfirm: Stop offering {{test}}? Your live price closes today and you cannot bid on it.
pricing.invalidAmount: Enter a valid amount (up to 2 decimal places).
pricing.empty: No test capabilities yet. Declare which tests your lab performs first.

vendor.portalDesc: Bid on government test tenders within your accredited scope and service area.

orders.title: Open tenders
orders.subtitle: Floated RFQs you are eligible to bid on — scoped by real database rules.
orders.emptyBody: When an order is floated and your lab qualifies on capability, NABL, and distance, it appears here.
orders.notFoundBody: This order is hidden by row-level security — your eligibility may have lapsed, or it was never floated to you.

jobs.title: Field jobs
jobs.subtitle: Assigned site work — geo check-in, QR specimen bind, chain of custody.
jobs.emptyBody: When your lab wins an award and you are assigned as technician, the job appears here.
jobs.notFoundBody: This job is hidden by row-level security — you may not be the assigned technician.
jobs.checkInBody: You must be within 150 m of the pour with GPS accuracy ≤ 50 m. A unique site photo hash is recorded server-side.
jobs.photoRequired: Attach a site photo to check in
jobs.bindBody: Attach a serialized QR sticker to each cube. Codes are globally unique and cannot be reused.

results.uploadCertBody: Signed PDF hash is stored server-side; signature verification is done by an officer.

fulfillment.title: Testing & payout
fulfillment.subtitle: Results, certificate verification, and treasury release — payment is never gated on pass/fail.
fulfillment.noJob: No field job linked to this award yet.
fulfillment.certMissing: Lab has not uploaded a certificate
fulfillment.paymentMissing: No payment row (award may predate hold_payment)
fulfillment.releaseHint: Release through treasury/PFMS once certificate is verified and every specimen has a result.

quality.title: Quality dashboard
quality.subtitle: Milestone health from test results, open escalations, certificates, and treasury release.
quality.emptyBody: Float orders and complete field execution to populate this view.

ratings.title: Vendor scorecards
ratings.subtitle: Derived reliability metrics — does not affect L1 award.
ratings.emptyBody: Scorecards appear after labs win awards and enter results.
ratings.footnote: Tiers computed from pass rate, payouts, and escalations.

earnings.title: Earnings
earnings.subtitle: Treasury-held and released payments for your awarded work.
earnings.emptyBody: Win an award and complete testing to see held payments here.
earnings.footnote: Held until certificate verified and all results entered — not gated on pass/fail.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Immutable, hash-chained record of state changes in your org scope.
audit.noAccessBody: Sign in as district officer, executive engineer, auditor, or head admin.
audit.chainIntact: Hash chain verifies — no tampering detected.
audit.emptyBody: Actions on orders, bids, and vendors appear here.
audit.filterEmptyBody: Try widening or clearing the filters above.

officers.title: Officer directory
officers.subtitle: Government officers in your org scope — office and login mobile.
officers.noAccessBody: You need user.read permission (district officer, EE, auditor, or head admin).
officers.emptyBody: Officers appear here when they hold a role under your organisation tree.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, appearance, and session preferences.
settings.subtitleGovOfficer: Your profile plus district administration — add officers and manage access (use sidebar for Vendor KYC, Officers, and other modules).
settings.appearanceDesc: Choose light or dark theme for the workspace.
settings.languageDesc: Interface language for menus and labels.
settings.sessionDesc: Sign out of Marketplace on this device.

help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Contact the Marketplace team, browse FAQs, and find quick links.
help.emailDesc: We typically respond within one working day.
help.faqSubtitle: Common questions about using the Marketplace portal.

signIn.a: Use the mobile number registered with your lab or department account. You will receive an OTP by SMS, and government officers may also need an MFA code.

rfq.q: How do RFQs and tenders work?
rfq.a: Government officers float test orders as RFQs. Accredited labs submit sealed bids before the deadline. Awards are recorded in the audit trail.

vendor.a: Complete the KYC wizard with NABL details and documents. A district officer reviews and approves your lab before you can bid on orders.

certificate.q: How can the public verify a certificate?
certificate.a: Anyone can open the Certificate Authenticity page and enter the certificate ID or scan the QR code on the issued PDF.

security.a: Every query runs with row-level security scoped to your organisation. Sessions use HTTP-only cookies — no tokens are stored in the browser.

signIn.heroDesc: Marketplace connects accredited testing labs with government projects across Tamil Nadu — from tender to field sample to certificate.
signIn.forLabsDesc: Register your lab, bid on district tenders, run field jobs, and track payments.
signIn.forOfficersDesc: Plan tests, float tenders, approve labs, and monitor quality on every project.
signIn.forPublicDesc: Anyone can check whether a test certificate is genuine — no login required.
signIn.footer: Government of Tamil Nadu · Public Works Department
signIn.rightFooter: Use the mobile number linked to your lab or department account.
signIn.devHelp: Pick a demo persona to explore the vendor or government portal.
signIn.govHierarchyHelp: Each login is scoped to an org level — State sees all districts; District officers see their district; Section engineers see their section subtree.

auth.phoneHelp: Enter the mobile registered with your lab or department account.
auth.mfaHelp: Government officers must enter the authenticator code.
auth.devOtpHint: Dev: OTP 123456 · Gov MFA 654321 (e.g. 9000000002 district officer)
auth.verifyFailed: Sign-in failed — check OTP and MFA.

verify.title: Certificate authenticity
verify.subtitle: Verify a tamper-evident test certificate issued through Marketplace.
verify.certIdPlaceholder: UUID from QR code on certificate
verify.footnote: Only non-sensitive summary fields are published. Full project records require government login.
verify.notFoundBody: No certificate matches this ID. Check the QR code or contact the issuing lab.

analytics.title: Procurement analytics
analytics.subtitle: District-scoped KPIs — orders, bids, payments, and escalations.
analytics.emptyOrders: No orders in your scope yet.
analytics.footnote: Figures respect row-level security — you see only your org subtree.

bid.sealedBody: Enter your price only — the server stores a cryptographic commitment, not the amount. Save your browser session to reveal later.
bid.priceHint: Total for all tests in this tender. Price is hidden until the reveal window.
bid.committedBody: Your price is sealed. Reveal it when the bidding window closes — missing the reveal window forfeits your bid.
bid.secretsSaved: Price saved in this browser session for reveal.
bid.secretsLost: Reveal credentials not found in this browser — you must reveal from the same device where you committed.
bid.waitForClose: Bidding still open — return after the close time to reveal.
bid.revealedBody: Your bid is now visible for L1 evaluation at award time.
bid.invalidPrice: Enter a valid price in rupees.
bid.noVendor: No lab profile linked to this account.
bid.revealFailed: Reveal failed — check price and nonce match your commitment.
bid.secretsMissing: Open this page on the same browser where you submitted the bid.

gov.title: Government portal
gov.portalDesc: Plan tests, float orders, compare bids, and verify certificates for public works.
gov.homeBody: Backend modules for the full procurement cycle are verified. UI screens roll out slice by slice.

module.planner: Auto-generate requirements from project stages and IS-code rules.
module.float: Assemble and float sealed RFQs to eligible labs.
module.bids: Compare revealed bids and award L1 atomically.
module.vendors: Review KYC documents and approve lab accreditation.
module.quality: Green / amber / red milestone health from results, escalations, and payouts.
module.ratings: Derived lab scorecards — pass rate, completions, open escalations.
module.analytics: Procurement KPIs — orders, bids, treasury payments, escalations.
module.audit: Append-only hash-chained audit log with integrity verification.

planner.title: Requirement planner
planner.subtitle: Generate the testing calendar from IS-code rules and project stage quantities.
planner.calendarHint: Requirements are snapshotted — re-planning the same stage is rejected.
planner.empty: No requirements yet — generate a calendar for this project.
planner.invalidQty: Enter valid quantities for all fields.
planner.noRequirements: No planned requirements for this stage.
planner.noUnits: This stage needs no measured quantities.

govOrders.title: RFQ pipeline
govOrders.subtitle: Review draft orders and float sealed tenders to eligible labs.
govOrders.listHint: Select an RFQ to view details, documents, and vendor participation.
govOrders.emptyBody: Generate requirements in the planner, create a draft RFQ, then float it here.

govAward.notFound: Order not found in your scope
govAward.bidComparisonHint: Prices appear only after the reveal window. L1 among technically qualified bids wins.
govAward.noBidsVisible: No bids visible yet — bidding may still be open, or you lack award permission.
govAward.biddingOpen: Sealed bidding is in progress. Bid counts and prices stay hidden until the window closes.
govAward.readyToClose: Bid close time has passed. Close bidding to open the reveal window.
govAward.readyToAward: Reveal window closed. Award the L1 qualified bidder atomically.
govAward.failedNoWinner: No technically qualified revealed bids — order marked FAILED.
govAward.noAwardPermission: Sign in as a District Officer to award (requires order.award permission).
govAward.devSkipToAward: Dev: skip to award (close reveal window)

rfqDetail.encryptedBids: Bid prices remain encrypted until the bid closing window ends.

govVendors.title: Vendor approval queue
govVendors.subtitle: Review submitted lab registrations in your district.
govVendors.requestInfoPlaceholder: e.g. NABL scope certificate is expired — please re-upload a valid copy.
govVendors.registerPanelHint: Creates a draft lab profile — vendor completes KYC via OTP sign-in.
govVendors.registerOk: {{name}} registered — vendor can sign in with their phone to complete KYC.
govVendors.sidePanelSubhint: Or register a new lab vendor for your district.
govVendors.emptyBody: Labs awaiting KYC review will appear here (status SUBMITTED).
govVendors.emptyFilterBody: Try another status tab or register a new vendor.
govVendors.rateCardNote: Current effective prices published by the lab. Read-only — officers cannot edit rates.
govVendors.rateCardFailed: Could not load the rate card.

checklist.title: Required tests checklist
checklist.empty: No requirements generated for this project yet.

catalog.title: Test checklist
catalog.subtitleGov: Every test at every construction level
catalog.subtitleVendor: Tests we do — every test at every construction level
catalog.search: Search name, code, or IS code

kyc.title: Lab registration (KYC)
kyc.subtitle: Complete your profile, upload documents, and submit for district officer approval.
kyc.gpsHint: Use your lab coordinates. Field check-in validates against this location.
kyc.reviewNote: Submitting locks your profile until the district officer completes review.
kyc.submitFailed: Submit failed — check required documents and capabilities.
kyc.statusBody: Your lab registration is {{status}}. You cannot edit it until review completes.
kyc.bannerBody: Upload KYC documents and select accredited test capabilities before you can receive tenders.
kyc.pendingBody: Your application was submitted. You will be notified when approved or if changes are needed.
kyc.previewUnavailable: Preview not available for this file type.
kyc.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields (name, address, GSTIN, PAN) before continuing.

states.emptyBody: When a tender is floated to your lab or a bid of yours is decided, it appears here.
states.errorBody: Something went wrong reaching the server. Check your connection and try again.

VENDOR_APPROVED.title: Your lab is approved
VENDOR_APPROVED.desc: Your accreditation was verified. You can now receive tenders and place bids.

VENDOR_REJECTED.title: Approval was declined
VENDOR_REJECTED.desc: Your lab was not approved. Contact your district office for the reason.

ORDER_FLOATED.title: New tender you can bid on
ORDER_FLOATED.desc: A test order was floated within your service area.

REVEAL_WINDOW_OPEN.title: Reveal your sealed bid
REVEAL_WINDOW_OPEN.desc: Bidding has closed. Reveal your price now, or your bid is forfeited and the EMD is lost.

AWARD_WON.title: You won the award
AWARD_WON.desc: Your bid was selected. A payment is held at your quoted price.

AWARD_LOST.title: Not selected this time
AWARD_LOST.desc: Another lab was awarded this tender.

ORDER_FAILED.title: Tender closed with no award
ORDER_FAILED.desc: The tender closed without a qualified bid.

row.deadLink: This tender is no longer available to your lab.
row.deadLinkWhy: Your eligibility changed after you were notified. You keep the notice, but it now leads nowhere — a dead link, never a disclosure.

contractor.contractsSubtitle: Open tenders you can bid on, and contracts awarded to you.
contractor.noContracts: No open tenders or awarded contracts right now.

reg.title: Contractor registration
reg.subtitle: Register once. A district officer reviews and approves.
reg.locked: Your details are locked while under review. You'll be notified once a decision is made.
reg.docsHelp: Upload a clear photo of each document. Starred documents are required.

contractor.notApprovedBody: Open tenders appear here once your contractor registration is approved by the district officer.

area.emptyNode: Nothing recorded under this area yet.
area.outsideBody: This area is not part of the organisation unit you are assigned to.

signInEmail.title: Sign in
signInEmail.subtitle: to access Marketplace
signInEmail.demoMfa: Demo mode — your MFA code is
signInEmail.invalidMfa: That code is not valid. Try again.

orgProfile.title: Organization Profile
orgProfile.logoHint: Shown on certificates and email notifications.
orgProfile.logoSpec: PNG, JPG or SVG · max 1 MB
orgProfile.logoTooLarge: Logo must be 1 MB or smaller.
orgProfile.name: Organization Name
orgProfile.saveFailed: Could not save. Check your permissions.

roleDetail.readOnly: You can view these permissions but not change them.

districtMap.title: District Map (Tamil Nadu)
districtMap.noOrdersYet: No open orders in this district yet.
districtMap.pickPrompt: Select a district on the map to see its details.

hierarchy.title: Hierarchy levels
hierarchy.subtitle: The organisation levels this deployment is built on, from state down to site.
hierarchy.fixedNote: Levels are fixed in the database: a unit's level must be exactly one step below its parent. Changing them requires a migration, so they are shown here rather than edited.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send a link to set a new one.
forgot.sentBody: If that address has an account, a reset link is on its way. The link expires in 30 minutes.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a password of at least {{min}} characters.
reset.tooShort: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
reset.mismatch: The two passwords do not match.
reset.invalidToken: That reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
reset.failed: Could not reset the password. Try again.
reset.missingBody: This page needs a reset link from your email.
